name: VendorSearch_Tool_v4
description: Search for existing vendors in SyteLine by vendor name or vendor number

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLVendors

Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <YOUR_SITE>

Query Parameters:
- properties: VendNum,Name,VadAddr_1,VadCity,VadState,VadZip,Phone,ExternalEmailAddr,_ItemId
- filter: SQL WHERE clause (e.g., Name LIKE '%ACME%' or VendNum = 'DEMO001')
- recordCap: Maximum records (default 10)
data.responseInstructions:
JSON response with:
- Success: true/false
- Items: Array of vendor objects (empty if no matches)
- Each vendor has VendNum, Name, and _ItemId

instructions:
Search for vendors. Use single quotes in filter.
Returns vendor details if found, empty Items array if not.
